name: Italian Sausage in Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add Italian sausage and cook for a few minutes until it seals or firms up.
3. Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside to cool.
4. In the same skillet, mix the remaining ingredients: Chablis wine and sliced mushrooms.
5. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat to low.
6. Cook on low for 1 hour, stirring occasionally.
7. Serve as a hot appetizer.
You may wish to be cautious with the wine at first. Some may find 1 cup too much.
